user_query: show me anomaly routes departing from albania in january
user_intent_summary: Identify anomalous flight routes departing from Albania during January.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for departures from Albania (alb) in January (01). Groups by route (departure and arrival airports) to compute per-route anomaly metrics using tot (count of alarms/events).

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for departures from Albania (alb) in January (01). Groups by route to compute per-route anomaly metrics using allarmati (count of alarmed passengers).
